title: US Stock Futures Slip as US-Iran Deal Hope Fades: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着美国与伊朗达成协议的希望消退，美国股指期货下跌：市场结束
summary: US equity futures declined while the dollar rose against most major peers in early trading after President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to his latest proposal to end the war, likely prolonging the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Oil Jumps After Trump Says Iran’s Peace Offer ‘Unacceptable’
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗的和平提议“不可接受”后油价上涨
summary: Oil surged after US President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s latest response to his proposal to end the war in the Middle East, prolonging the effective closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: UK, France to Host Multinational Meeting on Mission to Escort Ships Through Hormuz
title_cn: 英国和法国将主办护航船舶通过霍尔木兹任务的多国会议
summary: More than 40 nations will meet Monday to outline their military contributions to a European-led mission to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz once there’s a stable ceasefire.

title: Momentum-Obsessed Traders Seek Clues on Iran Truce
title_cn: 痴迷于动量的交易者寻求伊朗休战的线索
summary: Investors riding a scorching run of market momentum are likely to face a reality check when trading resumes in Asia after President Donald Trump rejected the latest peace offering.

title: Trump Says Iran Peace Proposal Response ‘Totally Unacceptable’
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗和平提议的回应“完全不可接受”
summary: “I have just read the response from Iran’s so-called ‘Representatives.’ I don’t like it — TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE,” President Trump says in a Truth Social post.

title: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Begins Evacuations From Tenerife
title_cn: 受汉坦病毒袭击的游轮开始从特内里费岛撤离
summary: A cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak is starting the process of evacuating passengers in Spain’s Canary Islands, almost a month after the contagious disease broke out.

title: O'Brien: Supreme Court Voting Rights Act Decision Likely Lead to "Redistricting War"
title_cn: 奥布莱恩：最高法院投票权法案的决定可能导致“选区重划战争”
summary: Bloomberg Opinion Senior Executive Editor Tim O'Brien joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to analyze the escalating tensions surrounding redistricting in the United States, particularly in light of recent Supreme Court rulings on the Voting Rights Act and decisions from the Virginia Supreme Court. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: RNC Gruters: This President's Been Going to Bat for the Average American Worker
title_cn: 共和党全国委员会格鲁特斯：这位总统一直在为美国普通工人而奋斗
summary: Republican National Committee Chairman Joe Gruters joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the recent polling data showing a slight increase in disapproval of President Trump's job performance, particularly among Republicans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/10/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 10 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Dr. Carlos Del Rio, Professor of Global Health and Epidemiology, Melissa Murray, Author of 'The US Constitution: A Comprehensive and Annotated Guide' and Former Law Clerk for Justice Sonia Sotomayor, Sara Albrecht, Chairman and CEO of Liberty Justice Center, Ethan Frisch and Ori Zohar, Co-Founders and Co-CEO's of Burlap & Barrel, Danny Russel, Former Assistant Secretary of State for East Asia, Nina Bandelj, Author of 'Overinvested: The Emotional Economy of Modern Parenting,' Johnny Olszewski, Democratic Representative of Maryland, Joe Gruters, Chair of the Republican National Committee, and John McCarthy, Former Biden Senior Advisor for Political Engagement. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump's Latest 10% Tariffs Declared Unlawful by US Trade
title_cn: 美国贸易宣布特朗普最新 10% 关税非法
summary: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed. Crooked Media’s Straight Scrutiny Co-host and author of The U.S. Constitution: A Comprehensive and Annotated Guide for the Modern Reader Melissa Murray joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Ultimate Guide to Travel Insurance for Complex Times
title_cn: 复杂时期旅行保险终极指南
summary:
We’re just weeks away from summer vacation, where families will be traveling across the country and around the world. That doesn’t even take into account Europe’s vacation month in August. Between the Iran-Lebanon war, possible fuel shortages, and ballooning flight costs – there are a lot of questions about upcoming travel.
So is travel insurance worth it? Bloomberg Pursuits' Sara Clemence joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Parenting Now Feels Like an Investment Strategy
title_cn: 为什么育儿现在感觉像是一种投资策略
summary: In an age of hustle culture and hyperoptimization, parenting has become a source of pressure. Author of “Overinvested: The Emotional Economy of Modern Parenting” Nina Bandelj joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the shift in modern-day parenting practices. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Olszewski" "Not Confident" the US Can Negotiate an Advantageous Deal with Iran
title_cn: 奥尔谢夫斯基“不相信”美国能够与伊朗谈判达成一项有利的协议
summary: Rep. Johnny Olszewski joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the recent news that Iran has submitted a response to a U.S. proposal via Pakistan and expressed concern over the lack of transparency and consultation with Congress, noting that the administration has provided no real-time updates or public hearings on the conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Spice Company Wins Suit Over 10% Trump Global Tariffs
title_cn: Spice Company 赢得针对特朗普 10% 全球关税的诉讼
summary: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed. Burlap and Barrel is a small spice importer and it's one of the plaintiffs that sued to get this result. Co-founders and Co-CEOs, Ethan Frisch and Ori Zohar and Liberty Justice Center Chairman & CEO Sara Albrecht join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump, Xi Set to Meet for High-Stakes Meeting in Beijing
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平将在北京举行高风险会议
summary: President Donald Trump said he’s looking forward to meeting Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, signaling his plans for the high-stakes summit are still on despite fresh tensions between the world’s largest economies. Former Assistant Secretary of State for East Asia Danny Russel joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pimco CIO Sees Risk of Fed Hiking Rates Due to Iran War, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称，Pimco首席信息官认为美联储因伊朗战争而加息的风险
summary: The war in Iran may lead the Federal Reserve to further delay interest-rate cuts or even raise borrowing costs, Pimco Chief Investment Officer Dan Ivascyn told the Financial Times.

title: Inflation Drumbeat Persists for Unnerved US Consumer
title_cn: 通胀鼓声持续，美国消费者心神不宁
summary: A fresh batch of consumer price data in the coming week is likely to affirm Americans’ growing frustration with inflation.

title: Why Your Grocery Store Has So Many Sparkling Waters
title_cn: 为什么你的杂货店有这么多气泡水
summary: Walk down the beverage aisle and you'll find dozens of sparkling water brands competing for your attention. It looks like saturation, but it's actually a sign of a category in the middle of a massive shift away from sugary sodas and toward healthier, zero-sugar alternatives. Spindrift's CEO says there's a clear path to $1 billion in sales. Nixie's founder says taste is everything. And a venture investor says the smartest money isn't on any one brand, it's on the companies that supply them all. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Begins Evacuation in Canary Islands
title_cn: 受汉坦病毒袭击的游轮开始在加那利群岛撤离
summary:
A cruiseship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak is starting the process of evacuating passengers in Spain’s Canary Islands, almost a month after the contagious disease broke out. Distinguished professor in the Division of Infectious Diseases at Emory University School of Medicine Dr. Carlos Del Rio joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss.

The vessel, the Dutch-flagged MV Hondius, anchored near Tenerife on Sunday and people have started to disembark, beginning with Spanish citizens, Spain’s Health Ministry said.

Passengers from the Netherlands, Germany and Belgium will follow and be flown to their countries, with both a Spanish and a Dutch plane ready. The Irish government is sending a plane to Spain on Sunday to repatriate two Irish citizens, who will then be sent to a medical facility for monitoring and isolation, a situation that could take several weeks, broadcaster RTE said. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qatar Sends First LNG Shipment Through Hormuz Since War Started
title_cn: 卡塔尔自战争开始以来通过霍尔木兹运送第一批液化天然气
summary:
A tanker carrying liquefied natural gas from Qatar appears to have transited the Strait of Hormuz, marking the country’s first export out of the region since the Iran war began. Bloomberg Asia Energy Lead Stephen Stapczynski joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss.

The Al Kharaitiyat, which loaded at the Ras Laffan export plant earlier this month, exited the strait and is in the Gulf of Oman, ship-tracking data compiled by Bloomberg shows. The vessel lists Pakistan as its next destination, according to the data.

The ship appears to have navigated the Tehran-approved northern route that hugs the Iranian coast through the strait, the data showed. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Wins Have Alphabet Poised to Become World’s Biggest Company
title_cn: 人工智能的胜利让 Alphabet 有望成为世界上最大的公司
summary: Over the past year, Alphabet Inc. has gone from an artificial intelligence afterthought to the one firm in the market with dominant positions in nearly every aspect of the technology. Now it’s on the brink of overtaking AI chip giant Nvidia Corp. as the largest company in the world.

title: Drone Hits Ship Near Qatar as US Awaits Iran Peace Plan Response
title_cn: 美国等待伊朗和平计划回应之际，无人机在卡塔尔附近击中船只
summary: A drone strike briefly set a cargo vessel ablaze in the Persian Gulf, the latest shipping attack to test a fragile ceasefire as the US awaits Iran’s response to its proposal to end 10 weeks of war.

title: Armani May Split Stake for Sale to Follow Will, Repubblica Says
title_cn: Repubblica 表示，阿玛尼可能会按照意愿拆分股份出售
summary: The Armani Group may split the 15% stake that is up for sale equally among its preferred buyers, as the company moves closer to implementing the wishes of founder Giorgio Armani, La Repubblica reported on Sunday.

title: Aramco CEO Warns of Long Oil Market Disruption as Profit Jumps
title_cn: 沙特阿美首席执行官警告称，随着利润大幅增长，石油市场将出现长期混乱
summary: Saudi Aramco’s boss warned of a long disruption to oil markets from the near closure of the Strait of Hormuz, while the company reported a jump in profit following higher prices and its ability to redirect exports via a pipeline bypassing the vital waterway.

title: Qatar Sends First LNG Shipment Through Hormuz Since War Started
title_cn: 卡塔尔自战争开始以来通过霍尔木兹运送第一批液化天然气
summary: A tanker carrying liquefied natural gas from Qatar appears to have transited the Strait of Hormuz, marking the country’s first export out of the region since the Iran war began.

title: Anwar to Outline Malaysia Oil Supply Continuity Plan: Bernama
title_cn: 安华将概述马来西亚石油供应连续性计划：马新社
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim will unveil a plan soon to shore up the country’s oil supply as uncertainties stemming from the conflict in Iran continue, Bernama reported.

title: New Russian-Flagged LNG Tanker Appears to Load US-Sanctioned Gas
title_cn: 悬挂俄罗斯国旗的新液化天然气油轮似乎正在装载美国制裁的天然气
summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker that recently switched flags to Russia appears to be loading fuel from a US-sanctioned project, marking Moscow’s latest move to expand its dark fleet designed to circumvent Western restrictions.

title: Chalmers on 'Unacceptable' Australian Housing Status Quo
title_cn: 查默斯谈澳大利亚住房现状“不可接受”
summary: Australian Treasurer Jim Chalmers will hand down the 2026-27 Federal Budget on May 12. It's framed as one the country's most consequential Budgets against a backdrop of inflation-fuelling global energy shocks, climbing cost-of-living, slowing productivity and a national debt edging toward A$1 trillion. Chalmers speaks with Bloomberg's James Mayger in Canberra. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Trader’s Guide to Navigating High Stakes Trump-Xi Talks
title_cn: 股票交易员应对高风险特习会谈的指南
summary: Investors are looking for further signs of easing tensions between President Donald Trump and his counterpart Xi Jinping to help remove an overhang on Chinese markets, with geopolitical and trade issues in focus.

title: Inside a Year of Chaos and Conflict at Kevin Hart’s Media Company
title_cn: 凯文·哈特媒体公司混乱和冲突的一年
summary: A new deal with Authentic Brands is seen by some employees as the beginning of the end

title: Apple to Make Design Changes in macOS 27 to Address Tahoe Quirks
title_cn: 苹果将​​在 macOS 27 中进行设计更改以解决 Tahoe 怪癖
summary: Also: The latest on iOS 27 and the truth about the Vision Pro.

title: Microsoft’s African Data Center Falters on Payment Demands
title_cn: 微软非洲数据中心因付款要求而陷入困境
summary: A major Microsoft Corp. data center site in East Africa has been delayed by disagreements with the Kenyan government over the company’s request for guaranteed payments, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Why Stablecoins Are Crypto’s Real Payments Test
title_cn: 为什么稳定币是加密货币的真正支付测试
summary: Every year, Filipinos working overseas send $35 billion back home — and a growing share of those transfers are being executed using stablecoins. The blockchain technology promises to make cross-border payments cheaper and nearly instantaneous, offering an alternative to traditional remittance channels. But even though the opportunity could be huge, stablecoins remain a tiny part of the global payments system today. With the GENIUS Act set to take effect and banks eyeing the space, the race to scale is just getting started. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Film Star Vijay Forms New Government in India’s Key iPhone Hub
title_cn: 电影明星 Vijay 在印度主要 iPhone 中心组建新政府
summary: South Indian film star C. Joseph Vijay’s party secured support of smaller parties to reach a majority and form the government in Tamil Nadu, one of India’s most industrialized states and a key hub for automobile and iPhone production.

title: Malaysia Mulls Steps Against Meta on Fake Royal Accounts: Report
title_cn: 马来西亚考虑对 Meta 假冒皇家账户采取措施：报告
summary: Malaysia is studying actions to be taken against Meta Platforms Inc. for failing to curb fake accounts involving the country’s Malay rulers, Bernama reported, citing Communications Minister Fahmi Fadzil.

title: Banks and Crypto Backers Tussle as Senators Eye Landmark Digital Asset Bill
title_cn: 参议员关注具有里程碑意义的数字资产法案，银行和加密货币支持者发生争执
summary: Banking groups are floating last-minute changes to a compromise on stablecoin yield as a key Senate panel begins considering a landmark digital asset bill.

title: QVC Shareholders Claim Firm Giving Their Value to Creditors
title_cn: QVC 股东声称公司向债权人提供了价值
summary: Shareholders of bankrupt television shopping network QVC accused the company of wrongly trying to divert hundreds of millions of dollars’ worth of assets to creditors as part of a proposal to cut debt and end the company’s insolvency case.

title: Trump Media Posts $405 Million Loss Driven by Crypto Holdings
title_cn: 特朗普媒体公布加密货币控股造成 4.05 亿美元损失
summary: The Trump family media group posted a net drop of $405.9 million in the first quarter, largely driven by unrealized losses in cryptocurrencies held by the company.

title: ECB’s Escrivá Says AI Risks Prompt Finance Infrastructure Review
title_cn: 欧洲央行 Escrivá 表示人工智能风险促使金融基础设施审查
summary: Central banks must review the resilience of financial infrastructure given the rise of artificial intelligence, as well as defend their role as the ultimate guarantor against risks posed by stablecoins, said European Central Bank Governing Council member José Luis Escrivá.

title: Kenya Plans Taxes on Phones, Banking Fees to Raise $1 Billion
title_cn: 肯尼亚计划通过电话税和银行费用筹集 10 亿美元
summary: Kenya plans taxes on mobile phones and banking fees to help raise nearly $1 billion in revenue in an effort to trim the nation’s fiscal deficit to its lowest in a decade and tackle debt challenges.

title: Chinese Export Growth Rebounds as War Fails to Curb Trade
title_cn: 战争未能遏制贸易，中国出口增长反弹
summary: China’s export growth rebounded more than expected despite disruptions to shipping caused by the war in Iran, as trade volumes swell due to an investment boom in artificial intelligence.

title: ByteDance Targets 25% Rise in AI Infrastructure Spending: SCMP
title_cn: 字节跳动的目标是人工智能基础设施支出增长 25%：南华早报
summary: ByteDance Ltd. has boosted planned spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure this year by 25% to 200 billion yuan ($29.4 billion), as memory chip costs rise and the TikTok owner ramps up its AI presence, the South China Morning Post reported on Saturday.

title: US Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to Alibaba Via Thailand
title_cn: 美国怀疑英伟达芯片经泰国走私至阿里巴巴
summary: A key company behind Thailand’s national AI effort is suspected of helping to smuggle billions of dollars worth of Super Micro Computer Inc. servers containing advanced Nvidia Corp. chips to China, with Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. one of multiple end customers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China’s Top Economic Planner Urges Stronger Coordination on AI
title_cn: 中国最高经济规划师敦促加强人工智能协调
summary: China’s leading economic planning agency called for stronger coordination and top-level planning in artificial intelligence development.

title: Some College Finals Delayed After Canvas Online Platform Hacked
title_cn: Canvas 在线平台被黑后，一些大学期末考试被推迟
summary: Disruptions for college students are set to drag into the weekend after hackers briefly took down an online platform used by thousands of schools around the world, from Princeton University in the US to the University of Manchester in the UK and the Universidad del Desarrollo in Chile.

title: Intel CEO Who Won Over Trump and Musk Now Needs a Breakthrough
title_cn: 赢得特朗普和马斯克支持的英特尔首席执行官现在需要突破
summary: After Lip-Bu Tan became chief executive officer of Intel Corp. in March of last year, the struggling company’s shares went nowhere for seven months while the chipmaker was getting trounced in the market for artificial intelligence.

title: Judge to Review Musk, SEC Settlement Deal in Twitter Stake Case
title_cn: 法官将审查马斯克与 SEC 在 Twitter 股权案中的和解协议
summary: A federal judge is asking for more information about a proposed settlement between Elon Musk and the US Securities and Exchange Commission, after the billionaire agreed to pay $1.5 million to end a lawsuit alleging he waited too long to disclose his growing stake in Twitter.

title: Trump Rejects New Iran Peace Offer as ‘Totally Unacceptable’
title_cn: 特朗普拒绝伊朗新的和平提议，称其“完全不可接受”
summary: President Donald Trump and Iran rejected each other’s latest peace proposals to end to the 10-week conflict as the two sides struggle to maintain a fragile ceasefire.

title: Starmer’s UK Rivals Circle Before Make-or-Break Reset Speech
title_cn: 斯塔默的英国竞争对手在成败重置演讲之前围观
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s political problems have likely grown too big to solve with a single speech. For now, he will try to forestall an immediate challenge to his job.

title: Bosnia-Herzegovina Envoy Who Clashed With Ethnic Serbs Resigns
title_cn: 与塞族发生冲突的波斯尼亚和黑塞哥维那特使辞职
summary: Christian Schmidt, the top international envoy to Bosnia-Herzegovina who was charged with guiding the country to a stable postwar future, is leaving his post.

title: Iran Makes New Offer on Uranium in Response to US, WSJ Says
title_cn: 《华尔街日报》称，伊朗针对美国提出新的铀报价
summary: Iran offered to transfer some of its stockpile of highly enriched uranium to a third country in its response to the latest US proposal to end 10 weeks of war, but rejected the idea of dismantling its nuclear facilities, the Wall Street Journal reported.

title: Chile Finance Head Sees 2% Growth Amid Reform Push This Year
title_cn: 智利财政部长预计今年改革推动力将实现 2% 增长
summary: Chile’s new conservative government expects the economy to grow slightly more than 2% this year as it pushes pro-investment reforms and cuts spending amid the impact of the Iran war on fuel prices.

title: Trump Aims to Press Xi Over China’s Approach to War in Iran
title_cn: 特朗普旨在就中国对伊朗战争的态度向习近平施压
summary: President Donald Trump is expected to press President Xi Jinping over China’s approach to Iran and hammer out details on a new board of trade when they meet this week in Beijing, senior US officials said Sunday.

title: Polish Fugitive Minister Fled Hungary as Orban Ousted
title_cn: 欧尔班下台后波兰逃亡部长逃离匈牙利
summary: Zbigniew Ziobro, the former Polish justice minister granted asylum in Hungary during Viktor Orban’s time as prime minister, fled to the US following Orban’s defeat in last month’s election, Gazeta Wyborcza reported on Sunday.

title: Latvian Defense Minister Spruds Resigns After Drone Incursions
title_cn: 拉脱维亚国防部长斯普鲁兹在无人机入侵后辞职
summary: Latvian Defense Minister Andris Spruds resigned after two drones crashed in the eastern part of the Baltic country last week.

title: Modi Urges Indians to Conserve Fuel, Curb Costly Oil Imports
title_cn: 莫迪敦促印度人节约燃料，遏制昂贵的石油进口
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi appealed to citizens to cut fuel use and avoid unnecessary travel as rising oil prices from the Iran war threaten to widen the nation’s import bill and strain foreign-exchange reserves.

title: Rayner Urges Starmer to Change Course After Election Losses
title_cn: 雷纳敦促斯塔默在选举失败后改变路线
summary: Angela Rayner, one of the potential contenders in any UK leadership contest, warned Prime Minister Keir Starmer he had to urgently change the direction of his government in an intervention that will be seen as setting out her stall in the event of a contest.

title: US Is Ramping Up Surveillance Flights Near Cuba, CNN Says
title_cn: 美国有线电视新闻网 (CNN) 称，美国正在加强古巴附近的监视飞行
summary: The US is increasing the number of intelligence-gathering flights off the coast of Cuba, CNN reported, citing public aviation data.

title: Netanyahu Says War With Iran Isn’t Over, Need to Secure Uranium
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡表示与伊朗的战争尚未结束，需要确保铀的安全
summary: The US-Israeli war with Iran is “not over” because there’s nuclear material in the country that still needs to be removed, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said.

title: Starmer Vows to Serve 10 Years But May Soon Face Challenge
title_cn: 斯塔默誓言服役 10 年，但可能很快就会面临挑战
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he intends to lead the UK for 10 years even as calls for his departure grow from within the governing Labour Party and rivals threatened to launch a leadership challenge in the coming days.

title: Once Ridiculed, Farage Is Closing In On His Quest to Rule the UK
title_cn: 曾经饱受嘲笑的法拉奇即将实现统治英国的目标
summary: The anti-establishment Reform leader scored big gains across England, Scotland and Wales last week. Now he needs to convert those local wins into national gravitas.

title: Pakistan in Talks With Iran for More Qatar LNG Via Hormuz
title_cn: 巴基斯坦正在与伊朗谈判通过霍尔木兹海峡购买更多卡塔尔液化天然气
summary: Pakistan held talks with Iran to allow a limited number of Qatari liquefied natural gas cargoes to transit the Strait of Hormuz, as Qatar sent through its first shipment since the war began.

title: Venezuelan Leader in The Hague for Land Dispute Against Guyana
title_cn: 委内瑞拉领导人在海牙与圭亚那发生土地纠纷
summary: Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodríguez arrived at The Hague to represent her country before the International Court of Justice in a land dispute with Guyana over resource-rich territory.

title: Midwest Pump Prices Are Spiking at Worst Possible Time for Trump
title_cn: 中西部汽油价格在特朗普可能最糟糕的时刻飙升
summary: As gasoline prices have ratcheted higher across the US due to the war in Iran, several Midwestern states have seen the steepest increases. That’s putting a strain on many of the voters Republicans need at the midterm elections in November to keep control of Congress.

title: Turkey’s Orthodox Patriarchate Says Greek Seminary Will Reopen
title_cn: 土耳其东正教宗主教表示希腊神学院将重新开放
summary: Turkey could reopen a Greek Orthodox seminary shut down more than 50 years ago in September, the patriarch of the Istanbul-based church said, according to Hurriyet newspaper on Sunday, an act the US and the European Union have repeatedly called for.

title: Far-Right Australian Party Wins Seat in First Election Victory
title_cn: 澳大利亚极右翼政党在首次选举中赢得席位
summary: A far-right party won its first lower house election in Australia, with the victory underscoring the collapse in support for the center-right coalition that’s governed for much of the post-war period.

title: Australia to Tackle ‘Unacceptable’ Housing Market, Chalmers Says
title_cn: 查尔默斯表示，澳大利亚将解决“不可接受”的房地产市场问题
summary: Australia’s upcoming budget will take aim at soaring home prices and seek to make it easier for people to gain a foothold in the housing market, Treasurer Jim Chalmers said.

title: US Awaits Iran Answer After Hormuz Clashes Strain Ceasefire
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突紧张停火后美国等待伊朗答复
summary: The US was waiting on Iran’s response to its latest proposal to end the war after suggesting word could come imminently, following clashes in the Strait of Hormuz that strained a monthlong ceasefire.

title: Brazil Supreme Court Suspends Law to Shorten Bolsonaro Sentence
title_cn: 巴西最高法院暂停缩短博尔索纳罗刑期的法律
summary: Brazilian Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes suspended the application of legislation that would reduce the amount of time former President Jair Bolsonaro and others will serve for plotting a coup attempt, according to a ruling released on Saturday.

title: Frontier Flight Strikes, Kills Pedestrian on Denver Runway
title_cn: 边境航班在丹佛跑道上袭击并杀死行人
summary: A Frontier Airlines flight leaving Denver International Airport struck and killed a person who stepped onto the runway after jumping a fence. Bloomberg's Danny Lee explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin Says Ukraine Ceasefire Prompted by Kyiv Security Warnings
title_cn: 普京称基辅安全警告促使乌克兰停火
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin said Moscow’s warnings that it would retaliate against any Ukrainian strikes on its annual Victory Day celebration helped spark a deal over a three-day ceasefire.

title: Catholic Diocese Fights US Bid to Seize Land for Border Wall
title_cn: 天主教教区反对美国征用土地修建边境墙
summary: A Catholic diocese in New Mexico is in court opposing the Trump administration’s effort to seize church property to construct more fencing along the southern border, accusing US officials of religious freedom violations.

title: Starmer Faces Fresh Leadership Threat After Heavy Election Loss
title_cn: 斯塔默在选举惨败后面临新的领导威胁
summary: A Labour Party lawmaker threatened to trigger a leadership contest to replace Keir Starmer, casting a shadow over the UK prime minister’s efforts to shore up his party after heavy election losses by appointing Gordon Brown as special envoy on global finance.

title: Ramaphosa’s Future Uncertain After Impeachment Risk Resurfaces
title_cn: 弹劾风险重新浮现后，拉马福萨的未来充满不确定性
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa’s faces a serious new challenge after the country’s top court revived an inquiry into a burglary at his farm that he was accused of covering up.
